payload.answer: Brain DB is source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest saturated-performance model remain open questions.
payload.decision: Store architectural roles as current durable facts; preserve open questions as non-committed (status: open).

entity_resolution.reason: No stable entity IDs were provided in the fixture/context; retain natural-language entity names.

payload.intent: Compile durable context into Brain memory cards

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection (i.e., derived from Brain DB rather than authoritative).
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open question: Should Telegram be added later as a memory intake channel/agent?
Open question: Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

details: Committed durable architecture roles (source of truth / projection / strict intake).
Preserved ambiguity by keeping Telegram and model-choice items as open questions.

repair_options: If Telegram and model selection decisions are later made, replace the corresponding open_question cards with decision/status cards.
If Slack’s intake strictness semantics differ from expectation, refine the Slack card with explicit rules.
